name: rldyour-flow
description: Autonomous Russian-first SDLC workflow for Codex: ry-init, ry-start, ry-newp, ry-review, ry-deploy, reviewer skills, and post-task sync.

interface.shortDescription: Auto SDLC commands: init, start, review, deploy
interface.longDescription: This plugin defines the rldyour autonomous SDLC workflow for Codex. It provides Russian-first command skills for ry-init, ry-start, ry-newp, ry-review, and ry-deploy, plus reviewer skills for architecture, implementation quality, consistency, integration synchronization, verification/manual tests, and security. The workflow uses Serena-first code understanding, technical and web research, LSP quality gates, browser validation, security review, GitHub and worktree workflows, server deployment verification, and post-task synchronization. Its Stop hook does not compete with the Serena memory hook: it waits for Serena memories to become current, then asks Codex to synchronize AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, git commits, GitHub, and cleanup state without creating an infinite hook loop.
defaultPrompt: Use $ry-init to initialize the current project scope.
Use $ry-start to implement a task through the full quality workflow.
Use $ry-review to review the current diff and integration graph.
